title: ASR Outdoor Handheld Brass Coin Probe for Metal Detecting and Treasure Hunting
description:
Treasure Hunt like a pro with the ASR Outdoor Brass Coin Probe! This handy tool is designed to pinpoint your findings once your metal detector alerts you of the treasure. Once you've found the spot, use a small digging tool to dig a plug and remove the plug. Then you should re-scan the area with your detector to make sure the treasure was not in the plug you removed. Then use your brass coin probe to slowly probe the small hole you created! This tool is ideal for hunting treasure because brass is non-marring, so you won't ruin the artifact, metal or coin you're searching for. This probe is 9.5" in length, has a rod size of 6.25" and is 5mm thick, so it's easy to carry and store when not in use. Make sure you grab one of these before your next treasure hunt!
